cookies.title: Privacy and Cookies
cookies.text: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze traffic in accordance with Mexican laws (LFPDPPP). By continuing, you accept our Privacy Notice.

policies.title: Comprehensive Privacy Notice
policies.intro: In compliance with the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties (LFPDPPP), the following is informed:

identity.title: 1. Identity and Address of the Data Controller
identity.content: Your Brand (hereinafter 'The Controller') is responsible for processing your personal data, located in Mexico City.

data.title: 2. Personal Data Collected
data.content: For the purposes outlined in this notice, we collect your name, email, and phone number through our contact form.

purpose.title: 3. Purposes of Processing
purpose.content: The data will be used exclusively for: (a) Providing information about requested services, (b) Addressing questions and comments, (c) Facilitating communication via WhatsApp.

rights.title: 4. ARCO Rights
rights.content: You have the right to Access, Rectify, Cancel, or Oppose the processing of your data. To exercise them, send an email to contact@yourbrand.net.

cookies.title: 5. Use of Cookies
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for site functionality and analytics to improve navigation. You can disable them in your browser settings.
